description: From the manufacturer Artesà Discover Artesà Range More Information's Dimensions : 18 x 4.5cm Capacity: 450ml Made from 100% glass Dishwasher safe Artesà Glass 18 cm Serving Bowl Looking for an outstanding display piece to complement your luxurious cutlery? Elevate your presentation with this stylish Artesà Glass Serving Bowl. With a quirky organic shape and a striking emerald-green swirl pattern, let this be the star of the show! Serve assorted snacks, sides and sweets with elegance. Let your guests help themselves to Greek olives, spicy balti mix and decadent Belgian chocolates with a big smile. Let your guests help themselves to Greek olives, spicy balti mix and decadent Belgian chocolates with a big smile. You can also decorate the bowls to enhance your modern living room. Add finishing touches to your décor with beautiful seashells, fluffy feathers and even tiny pebbles for a wow effect. Table presentation A true delight with this stunning decorative Artesà Glass Serving Bowl featuring a curved organic shape and distinctive emerald-green swirl design. Present snacks, sides and sweets with this statement-making centrepiece to ensure your food looks just as fantastic as it tastes. Green glass This green glass serving bowl is also available in 13 cm for smaller snacks and trinkets! Complete your luxurious display by combining this set with other matching pieces from the Artesà collection, including teaspoons, serving forks, butter spreaders and cheese knives, as well as a cocktail serving tree! Curved organic This extraordinary Glass Serving Bowl from Artesà with a curved organic shape and unique emerald-green swirl design makes a stunning table presentation for special occasions. Made from 100% glass, the bowls are ideal for serving dips, nibbles, puddings and more. Artesà Discover Artesà Range
